data.title: Solana price fractal targets rally to $260, but one thing must happen first — Analysts
data.description:
Key takeaways:Solana’s bull flag pattern projects a rally to $260, but low spot buy volumes have analysts advising caution. After briefly dropping to $160 from $184, Solana (SOL) is attempting to reclaim a position above its key resistance at $180 for a second consecutive week. With Bitcoin (BTC) hitting an all-time high, market speculators are banking on eventual capital rotation, which could pump major altcoins like SOL toward new highs. Solana shows promising signs on the daily chart, forming a textbook bull flag pattern after a strong uptrend
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/solana-price-fractal-targets-rally-to-260-but-one-thing-must-happen-first-analysts?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: OpenAI plans to ship 100 million pocket-sized AI devices for everyday use
data.description:
OpenAI is planning to develop AI “companion” devices that will integrate artificial intelligence capabilities with everyday life, potentially opening the door to a new high-tech innovation used alongside laptops and smartphones. In an interview with The Wall Street Journal, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he and designer Jony Ive are developing these secret devices for mass consumption, with plans to ship 100 million units upon launch. Ives joined OpenAI after his startup, io, was acquired by Altman’s company in a $6. 5 billion deal, the Journal reported on May 21
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/openai-100-million-pocket-sized-ai-devices-everyday-use?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: ECB Warns of Major Downside Risk As Stock Market Goes ‘Out of Sync’ With Geopolitical Uncertainty
data.description:
The European Central Bank (ECB) is warning that the past month’s stock market recovery is at risk amid ongoing geopolitical uncertainty. In a forward to the bank’s biannual “Financial Stability Review,” ECB Vice President Luis de Guindos says markets are still “highly sensitive” to news about global trade arrangements.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/22/ecb-warns-of-major-downside-risk-as-stock-market-goes-out-of-sync-with-geopolitical-uncertainty/

data.title: OpenAI Plans AI Companion Devices and Social Media Expansion
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, OpenAI is set to revolutionize the tech landscape with the development of AI 'companion' devices designed to seamlessly integrate artificial intelligence into daily life. These devices, envisioned by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and renowned designer Jony Ive, aim to complement existing technologies like laptops and smartphones. The ambitious project plans to launch with an initial shipment of 100 million units, signaling a significant leap in AI consumer technology.

Jony Ive, who joined OpenAI following the acquisition of his startup io for $6.5 billion, described these devices as part of a 'new design movement.' While specific details about the devices' appearance and functionality remain undisclosed, Ive hinted at a design philosophy reminiscent of Apple's cohesive hardware and software ecosystem. OpenAI's venture into hardware is backed by substantial investor confidence, fueled by the success of its ChatGPT large language model, which boasts nearly 800 million weekly active users as of May 2025. This success has propelled OpenAI's valuation from $157 billion in October 2024 to an impressive $300 billion by March 2025.

Beyond hardware, OpenAI is also setting its sights on the social media landscape, with plans to challenge platforms like Elon Musk's X and Mark Zuckerberg's Meta. As reported by The Verge, OpenAI's new social media platform will integrate ChatGPT's image generation capabilities with a feed structure similar to X's. It remains uncertain whether this platform will be a standalone product or an extension of ChatGPT. This initiative reflects a broader trend of blending AI with social media, a movement that has also influenced the blockchain sector. Startups are increasingly leveraging AI and blockchain technologies to create AI agents, large language model tools, and decentralized social media networks.

In a related development, Validation Cloud has implemented a large language model on the Hedera network, enhancing decentralized finance users' ability to query blockchain data. This integration exemplifies the growing intersection of AI and blockchain, highlighting the potential for innovative applications across various industries. OpenAI's endeavors in both hardware and social media underscore its commitment to expanding the reach and impact of artificial intelligence, positioning the company as a key player in the evolving tech ecosystem.

data.title: Solana's Bull Flag Pattern Suggests Potential Rally Amid Cautious Market Sentiment
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Solana (SOL) is showing signs of a potential rally, with its bull flag pattern projecting a rise to $260. However, analysts are advising caution due to low spot buy volumes. Recently, Solana's price dipped from $184 to $160 but is now attempting to regain its position above the key resistance level of $180 for the second consecutive week. As Bitcoin (BTC) reaches an all-time high, market speculators are hopeful for a capital rotation that could drive major altcoins like SOL to new heights.

Solana's daily chart reveals a promising bull flag pattern following a strong uptrend. Currently trading below $180, a breakout above this level could push SOL towards an initial target of $200, with further potential to reach $220 if the momentum continues. The trend remains bullish, supported by a relative strength index (RSI) of 64.30, indicating healthy momentum without overbought conditions. However, for the rally to proceed, SOL requires a clear market structure break (MSB) or a decisive bullish breakout above $180. Declining volumes during the consolidation phase suggest caution, as insufficient buying pressure could hinder the breakout. Should SOL fail to surpass $180, the immediate focus shifts to the $140-150 range, with the bull flag pattern becoming invalid. This support range acts as a daily order block, providing higher time frame (HTF) support in the event of a price correction.

Crypto trader Robert Mercer has identified a price fractal pattern similar to October 2024, highlighting two critical zones: one from late 2024, where SOL broke past $180 after consolidation, and a current zone reflecting that setup. Mercer predicts that a breakout above $180 could trigger a sharp upward rally, akin to the late 2024 surge that saw SOL peak near $260. Similarly, technical analyst Javon Marks noted a hidden bullish divergence on Solana's 3-day chart, a pattern that previously led to a 1,332% increase in 2024. Marks suggests that if this pattern reemerges in 2025, Solana could reach a price target of $450. Popular crypto trader XO is also monitoring the situation, recommending waiting to see if Solana can convert the $180 level into support before considering a long position.

This article does not provide investment advice or recommendations. Every investment and trading decision involves risk, and readers should conduct their own research before making any decisions.

data.title: Cetus Protocol Breach Leads to Severe Price Drops for Sui Ecosystem Tokens
data.description:
TL;DR An exploit on Cetus Protocol led to the theft of $223 million and caused several Sui-based token prices to plunge over 50%. The attack forced Cetus to pause its smart contract; $60 million had already been moved to Ethereum after being converted to USDC. Various efforts are underway to stop the movement of the. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/cetus-protocol-breach-leads-to-severe-price-drops-for-sui-ecosystem-tokens/

data.title: Bitcoin's Realized Cap Jumps $3B Daily as Accumulation Persists
data.description:
The total market value of Bitcoin, known as its Realized Cap, has experienced a significant increase of $3 billion each day, reflecting continued interest and accumulation by investors in the cryptocurrency market. This upward trend suggests that more individuals and institutions are actively acquiring Bitcoin, contributing to a robust demand that drives the Realized Cap higher. As these investors hold onto their assets, it indicates a strong belief in the long-term potential of Bitcoin and the broader cryptocurrency ecosystem.
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/ampstories/web-stories/bitcoins-realized-cap-jumps-3b-daily-as-accumulation-persists

data.title: Bitwise and 21Shares Solana ETF Reviews Delayed as SEC Extends Decision Timeline
data.description:
The SEC has postponed its decision on Bitwise’s and 21Shares Solana ETF staking proposal now due July 6, 2025, reflecting an approach to staking within regulated funds. More than 70 crypto ETFs—including SOL, XRP and DOGE products—have been queued as regulators scrutinize market risks.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitwise-21shares-solana-etf-sec-delay/

data.title: Kraken to offer tokenized US stocks to non-US clients
data.description:
Crypto exchange Kraken is planning to offer non-US customers the option of trading tokenized US stocks, part of the company’s push to offer more traditional assets via tokenization. The products will be offered through Backed, a new Kraken partner, according to a statement shared with Cointelegraph. Tokens representing the stocks will be stored on the Solana blockchain due to its “unmatched performance, low latency and thriving global ecosystem,” the statement said. “The whole point of crypto is that we're able to see things very transparently,” Kraken co-CEO Arjun Sethi said during Solana's Accelerate event on May 22
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/kraken-tokenized-us-stocks-international-clients-report?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
